workflows.navigate_to_url: Click the address bar (or press Ctrl+L). Type the full URL. Press Enter.
workflows.search: Click the address bar (Ctrl+L). Type your search query. Press Enter. Results appear on the page.
workflows.search_on_page: Press Ctrl+F. Type search term. Use Enter to cycle through matches.
workflows.new_tab: Press Ctrl+T for a new tab.
workflows.close_tab: Press Ctrl+W to close the current tab.
workflows.scroll_down: Press Space or Page Down. Or use mouse scroll.
workflows.click_link: Find the link text on the page and click it.
workflows.go_back: Press Alt+Left or click the back arrow.

layout.page_content: The large area below the address bar — web page renders here
layout.sidebar: Optional left panel (favorites, history, reading list)

tips: Use Ctrl+L to focus the address bar instantly — don't click on it.
For GitHub search: use the search bar ON THE GITHUB PAGE, not the browser address bar.
For site-specific search: navigate to the site first, then use its search feature.
If a cookie consent banner appears, click 'Reject All' or 'Accept' to dismiss it.
